commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=0cc2a75d166f94686e618aa35f751ea3c12da82a)
commands.review_summary:
Adds a Telegram formatter option to promote the final markdown blockquote into Telegram’s native expandable blockquote HTML form, with formatter and chunking tests.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a feature/API extension rather than a broken documented OpenClaw behavior. Source inspection shows current main has normal Telegram blockquote rendering but no `expandFinalBlockquote` option, while Telegram’s API supports the target HTML form.
commands.review_followup: The remaining action needs maintainer direction on the shared MarkdownIR boundary and coordination with the narrower sanitizer PR before any automated repair path is safe.

target.title: fix(memory-wiki): bound compile page reads
target.body:
## Summary
- Bound Memory Wiki page-summary reads during compile with the existing concurrency helper.
- Added a regression test that asserts compile never opens more than 16 page reads at once.
- Added an Unreleased changelog entry.

Fixes #68738.

## Real behavior proof
Source-checkout CLI entrypoint equivalent to `openclaw wiki compile` on a Documents/Codex proof vault with 180 source pages.

Setup:
- Vault root: `$PROOF_ROOT/vault` (redacted from `/Users/.../Documents/Codex/openclaw-memory-wiki-proof-20260520-1950/vault`)
- Config: isolated `memory-wiki`, native render mode, Obsidian disabled
- Corpus: `sources/proof-001.md` through `sources/proof-180.md`

First compile with JSON completed successfully and produced:

```text
pageCounts={"source":180,"report":9,"entity":0,"concept":0,"synthesis":0}
totalPages=189
exit=0
```

Rerun proof output:

```text
$ OPENCLAW_CONFIG_PATH=$PROOF_ROOT/openclaw.json \
  OPENCLAW_STATE_DIR=$PROOF_ROOT/state \
  NODE_DISABLE_COMPILE_CACHE=1 \
  node --import tsx src/entry.ts wiki compile
Compiled wiki vault at $PROOF_ROOT/vault (189 pages, 0 indexes updated).
real 31.94
user 29.46
sys 1.90
```

## Testing
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run extensions/memory-wiki/src/compile.test.ts`
- `./node_modules/.bin/oxlint -c .oxlintrc.json --type-aware --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.extensions.json --report-unused-disable-directives-severity error extensions/memory-wiki/src/compile.ts extensions/memory-wiki/src/compile.test.ts`
- `OPENCLAW_LOCAL_CHECK=0 corepack pnpm run lint:extensions:bundled`
- `corepack pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 extensions/memory-wiki/src/compile.ts extensions/memory-wiki/src/compile.test.ts CHANGELOG.md`
- `git diff --check origin/main..HEAD`
